title: Copy, paste, cut, undo, redo
drDigitalIntro: Now the moves you'll use every day. Select some text, then: Command+C copies it, Command+V pastes it somewhere else, and Command+X cuts it (copy plus remove). Made a change you don't like? Command+Z undoes it, and Command+Shift+Z redoes it. And Command+A selects everything.

playgroundTask.instructions: Copy the text below, then paste it into the box.

drDigitalSuccess: Nice work! Copy and paste will save you so much time from here on out.
drDigitalHint: Select the text first — click and drag across it — then use Command+C to copy and Command+V to paste.
